context: Tests correct use of frame vs page context for elements inside and outside the CloudWatch iframe.

checklist.name: Histogram hidden via frame.evaluate
checklist.description: Code uses frame.evaluate() (not page.evaluate()) to hide the histogram, since it is inside the iframe

checklist.name: Targets .logs__histogram-container
checklist.description: Histogram element is selected by .logs__histogram-container class

checklist.name: Sets display:none on histogram
checklist.description: Histogram is hidden by setting style.display = 'none'

checklist.name: Sidebar collapsed via page locator
checklist.description: Sidebar close button is targeted via page.locator() (not frame.locator()), since it is in the outer shell

checklist.name: Sidebar aria-label used for close button
checklist.description: Code uses aria-label selector such as 'Close navigation' or 'Collapse sidebar' to find the button

checklist.name: Existence check before clicking sidebar button
checklist.description: Code checks isVisible() or uses a try/catch before clicking the sidebar button (it may already be collapsed)

checklist.name: Obtains iframe frame for histogram work
checklist.description: Code calls page.frame({ name: 'microConsole-Logs' }) before querying histogram
